title: cystium coulteri
intro: Cystium coulteri, also known as Coulter's bladderwort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the bladderwort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in treating urinary tract issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Cystium coulteri include its ability to relieve symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure. Cystium coulteri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
